name: part_009
file: tmp_【重大告知アリ＆3D LIVE】秘密結社holoX4周年 3DLIVE【#SSholoX4周年】 [Z_E5w_pYAck]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Collaboration announcement intro in the style of the Monogatari series.
HoloX members react with overwhelming excitement to the Monogatari Series collaboration announcement.
The members discuss the upcoming 6th announcement, using their discography count as a hint.
Announcement of Secret Society holoX's 1st Album 'Secret ORDER' and its release details.
Lui-nee transitions to the final part of the live show, teasing one last surprise.

subtitles.original: 其ノ怪シイ集団ハ、
subtitles.english: That mysterious group,

subtitles.original: 偶像ーー“アキドル”ナノダト云フ。
subtitles.english: is said to be idols.

subtitles.original: ソシテーー
subtitles.english: And so—

subtitles.original: 正確ナ話ヲスルト、征服ショウトシテイルノハエデンノ星ラシイ。
subtitles.english: To be precise, it seems they are trying to conquer the planet Eden.

subtitles.original: タダ、ドイウコトカ、交ハルハズノナキ世界ガ、今回バカリハ油断シテシマッタラシイ。
subtitles.english: However, for some reason, it seems the worlds that should never have crossed paths have let their guard down this once.

subtitles.original: 交 kou (2021)
subtitles.english: Intersection (2021)

subtitles.original: 特別話 秘密結社holoX × 物語シリーズ 其ノ零
subtitles.english: Special Story: Secret Society holoX x Monogatari Series Episode Zero

subtitles.original: 映像使用書体 HGP明朝B
subtitles.english: Video Font: HGP Mincho B

subtitles.original: 〈物語〉シリーズ × holoX コラボ開催決定
subtitles.english: Monogatari Series x holoX Collaboration Confirmed

subtitles.original: うわあああああ！
subtitles.english: Waaaah!

subtitles.original: 待って、やばい！いいの！？え、いいの！？
subtitles.english: Wait, oh my god! Is this allowed?! Wait, really?!

subtitles.original: え、まずい、やばい！
subtitles.english: Wait, this is crazy, oh my god!

subtitles.original: え、いいんですか！？
subtitles.english: Wait, is this for real?!

subtitles.original: え、やばすぎ、やばすぎ！え、めっちゃ大好きじゃんね！
subtitles.english: Wait, this is too crazy, too crazy! We love it so much, don't we!

subtitles.original: ね、好き！
subtitles.english: Yeah, we love it!

subtitles.original: え、やばすぎる！え、どういうこと！？
subtitles.english: Wait, this is insane! Wait, what's happening?!

subtitles.original: え、でもさ、どっか行っちゃった！どっか行っちゃったよ！
subtitles.english: Wait, but they're gone! They disappeared!

subtitles.original: え、ちょっと待って！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Wait, hold on a second! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: はい、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: なんと、マジで！え、怒られない？我輩。
subtitles.english: Unbelievable, seriously! Wait, I'm not gonna get yelled at, am I?

subtitles.original: 怒られない、怒られない！
subtitles.english: No one's gonna yell at you!

subtitles.original: 怒られるとしたら、台本を読んでないことで怒られる...
subtitles.english: If anything, you'll get yelled at for not reading the script...

subtitles.original: 早く伝えようよ！なんと物語シリーズとのコラボが決定しました！
subtitles.english: Let's just tell them quickly! A collaboration with the Monogatari series has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: どういうこと！？どういうこと！？
subtitles.english: What does this mean?! What's going on?!

subtitles.original: どういうこと！ってみんなも言ってる！
subtitles.english: Everyone's asking "What's going on!" too!

subtitles.original: 詳細は随時発表されるようなので、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Details will be announced as they come, so stay tuned!

subtitles.original: え、我々も分かっていない...
subtitles.english: Wait, even we don't know...

subtitles.original: そうなんです。本当に詳細が何も分かってない！
subtitles.english: That's right. We literally know zero details!

subtitles.original: どういうことですか！ええー！？
subtitles.english: What do you mean by that?! What?!

subtitles.original: どうなるんでしょうか...。いや、ちょっと我々も焦ってるんですけど...
subtitles.english: I wonder what'll happen... Yeah, we're honestly a bit flustered ourselves...

subtitles.original: え、いいんですか！？いいんですか！？っていう感じなんですけど...
subtitles.english: Like, is this really okay?! Is it really okay?! That's how we feel...

subtitles.original: 最後に一つ、あるみたいなので、そちらに行きましょう！
subtitles.english: But it looks like there's one last thing, so let's check it out!

subtitles.original: あ、もう一個見ないといけないんだ！一旦、動揺を...
subtitles.english: Oh, we have to see one more thing! Let's just calm down for a bit...

subtitles.original: 動揺を落ち着けてみんな！落ち着けて！
subtitles.english: Everyone, calm your nerves! Just calm down!

subtitles.original: 俺たちが動揺してる間に、皆さんこの6つ目が何か...
subtitles.english: While we're freaking out, everyone, try to guess what this 6th thing is...

subtitles.original: コメントで教えてみてください！
subtitles.english: Tell us in the comments!

subtitles.original: 何かなー？
subtitles.english: I wonder what it is?

subtitles.original: コメント見に行こう。やばかったね。
subtitles.english: Let's look at the comments. That was crazy.

subtitles.original: 何かあるか？忍？忍かな？
subtitles.english: Anything there? Shinobu? Could it be Shinobu?

subtitles.original: 怒られないかな？え、やば、何事！？何事ということですが！
subtitles.english: Hope we don't get in trouble. Wait, crazy, what is it?! "What's going on" is right!

subtitles.original: 最後の一つは皆さん何だと思いますか？
subtitles.english: What do you all think the final announcement is?

subtitles.original: なんとですね、まあヒントを言うと、
subtitles.english: Well, to give you a hint,

subtitles.original: まあ今年、2曲作りましたよね？
subtitles.english: well, we made two songs this year, right?

subtitles.original: ああ、作った！いっぱい出た！
subtitles.english: Oh, we did! So many came out!

subtitles.original: 全部でholoXって何曲ありますか？
subtitles.english: How many songs does holoX have in total?

subtitles.original: 何曲？何曲だ？そして...
subtitles.english: How many? I wonder how many? And...

subtitles.original: あの、たくさん！
subtitles.english: Um, a lot!

subtitles.original: 覚えてないのか！
subtitles.english: You don't remember?!

subtitles.original: holoXが出してきた企画を除きまして、全部で...
subtitles.english: Excluding the ones for special projects, holoX has...

subtitles.original: 7曲あります！なんと7曲！すごーい！多いね！
subtitles.english: 7 songs in total! A whole 7 songs! Wow! Amazing! That's a lot!

subtitles.original: え、ってことは？もしや？
subtitles.english: Wait, which means? Could it be?

subtitles.original: え、みんな分かってる？みんなコメント欄分かってきたんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Wait, does everyone know? Is the comment section starting to figure it out?

subtitles.original: どうだ？あ、来てる来てる来てる！
subtitles.english: How is it? Oh, they're getting it, they're getting it!

subtitles.original: ということで、気づいてる人もいるみたいなので、
subtitles.english: So, since it looks like some of you have noticed,

subtitles.original: やっぱりあちらでございます！6枚目オープン！
subtitles.english: it's exactly what you think! Open the 6th panel!

subtitles.original: バーン！じゃん！なんと！
subtitles.english: BAM! Tada! Unbelievable!

subtitles.original: Secret Society holoX 1st Album "Secret ORDER" 2026.04.08 RELEASE
subtitles.english: Secret Society holoX 1st Album "Secret ORDER" 2026.04.08 RELEASE

subtitles.original: ファーストアルバムが出ます！
subtitles.english: Our 1st album is coming out!

subtitles.original: やったあああああ！うれしいい！
subtitles.english: Yaaaay! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: うれしい！ということで！
subtitles.english: I'm so glad! So!

subtitles.original: ファーストアルバム、ファーストオーダーじゃない、
subtitles.english: The 1st album, it's not First Order,

subtitles.original: ファーストアルバム、シークレットオーダー！
subtitles.english: the 1st album is "Secret ORDER"!

subtitles.original: 混ざった混ざった！大丈夫大丈夫。シークレットオーダーだよ。しょうがないよ。
subtitles.english: You got them mixed up! It's okay. It's Secret ORDER. Totally understandable.

subtitles.original: はい、こちらのシークレットオーダー、holoXでの4年間をギュッと詰め込んだアルバムとなっております！
subtitles.english: Yes, this Secret ORDER is an album packed with our four years together as holoX!

subtitles.original: 我々のデビュー曲「ジョヤリペイント」はオリジナルバージョンに加えて、
subtitles.english: In addition to the original version of our debut song "Joyful Paint,"

subtitles.original: 本策のために新たにリアレンジされたバージョンも収録されています！
subtitles.english: it also includes a newly re-arranged version just for this release!

subtitles.original: 何ですってー！
subtitles.english: What was that?!

subtitles.original: そしてさらに、なんかまだ未発表の楽曲も...
subtitles.english: And what's more, there are some still unannounced songs too...

subtitles.original: 多すぎる多すぎる！わらわらわら。
subtitles.english: Too many, too many! Whoa, whoa, whoa.

subtitles.original: ということでですね、通常版になるんですけど...
subtitles.english: So, this is regarding the regular edition...

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと、上が見えないです。早い早い。
subtitles.english: Oh, wait, I can't see the top. Too fast, too fast.

subtitles.original: 流れがね。早いですね。すみません。
subtitles.english: The flow, yeah. It's moving fast. Sorry about that.

subtitles.original: 通常版には初回限定特典があります！ありますよ！
subtitles.english: The regular edition comes with a first-press limited bonus! It sure does!

subtitles.original: こちらでございますね。各メンバーのソロバージョン、
subtitles.english: This is it right here. Solo versions for each member,

subtitles.original: そしてジャケット4種類のうち、ランダムで1枚つきます！
subtitles.english: and you'll get one of four different jackets at random!

subtitles.original: そしてこちらですね。4枚並べると...
subtitles.english: And also, if you line up all four...

subtitles.original: どうやら一枚絵になるとのことですよ！
subtitles.english: apparently, they form a single large illustration!

subtitles.original: え、すごい！つながりそうな顔してる！ラプちゃんの角が刀の上に...
subtitles.english: Whoa, amazing! They definitely look like they'd connect! La+-chan's horn is above the sword...

subtitles.original: あ、本当だ！本当だ！じゃあこれさ、並べないと...
subtitles.english: Oh, you're right! You're right! Then we definitely have to line them up...

subtitles.original: 並べないとね。並べないと。そして...
subtitles.english: Gotta line them up. Absolutely. And...

subtitles.original: 完全生産限定版封入特典は、
subtitles.english: The bonuses included in the complete limited production edition are,

subtitles.original: カッコよさ満点の今回のアルバムには、
subtitles.english: for this incredibly cool album,

subtitles.original: holoXらしい秘密の仕掛けが！
subtitles.english: a secret gimmick worthy of holoX!

subtitles.original: 秘密の仕掛け！？え、我々も分かってないぞ...
subtitles.english: A secret gimmick?! Wait, we don't even know what that is...

subtitles.original: 隠されているとか！
subtitles.english: Like something hidden?!

subtitles.original: な、なんですって！？ちょっと私達も分からないのですが...
subtitles.english: W-What was that?! Honestly, even we're in the dark here...

subtitles.original: この後22時から販売開始です！
subtitles.english: Sales start right after this at 10 PM!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひご予約お願いいたします！お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please, please do pre-order! We're counting on you!

subtitles.original: ということで、めっちゃ告知盛りだくさんだったんですけど、
subtitles.english: So, we had a ton of announcements today,

subtitles.original: まあね、この告知カードちゃんたちは、これで役目も終わりということで、
subtitles.english: but well, these announcement cards have served their purpose now,

subtitles.original: 消えろー！バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Disappear! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: それで消せんの！？コヨー！いやここ流石に金かけすぎだろ！
subtitles.english: You can make them disappear like that?! Koyo! Seriously, they spent way too much money on this!

subtitles.original: 何だこれ！このギミックやばいだろ！
subtitles.english: What the heck! This gimmick is insane!

subtitles.original: 一瞬だけね！一瞬だけ。こよの力ってすげーからな、みんな！
subtitles.english: Just for a second! Just a second. Koyo's power is amazing, you guys!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、ライブもラストスパートでございます！
subtitles.english: Alright, so the live show is entering its last spurt!

subtitles.original: この後ですね、何やらちょっとお知らせ？サプライズ？があるらしいですよ！
subtitles.english: Apparently, there's some kind of announcement? Or surprise? coming up later!

subtitles.original: なになに！？
subtitles.english: What is it?!

subtitles.original: はい、最後までチャンネルはそのままでお願いいたします！
subtitles.english: Yes, please stay tuned to this channel until the very end!

subtitles.original: お願いしまーす！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: いくぞみんな、最後まで！
subtitles.english: Let's go everyone, until the end!

subtitles.original: 楽しんで、いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Have fun! Here we go!

subtitles.original: いくぞー！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Yay!
